name: Elaina, The Wandering Witch
desc:
1 non-Link Spellcaster monster
Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can discard 1 Spell Card; excavate up to 10 cards from the top of your Deck, then if you excavated 2 or more Spell Cards, your opponent choose 2 among them, you can add 1 of chosen cards to your hand and send the other card to the GY.
During the End Phase, while this card is on the field or in your GY: You can return this card to the Extra Deck.
You can only Special Summon 1 "Elaina, The Wandering Witch" per turn.
strings: Return to Extra Deck in End Phase
